# RedCoral

> RedCoral is a modern POS (Point of Sale) system designed for restaurants and hospitality businesses in Spain. It works fully offline, includes Verifactu compliance (Spain's anti-fraud invoicing regulation), and provides tamper-proof audit trails for every transaction.

## Key Facts

- **Product type**: Desktop POS software for Windows
- **Target market**: Restaurants, bars, and hospitality businesses in Spain
- **Offline-first**: All core functions (orders, payments, receipt printing) work without internet
- **Verifactu compliance**: Built-in digital signatures and immutable records meeting Spain's 2027 anti-fraud regulation
- **Anti-fraud audit trail**: Every operation is cryptographically chained — impossible to delete or alter
- **Multi-device sync**: Connect multiple terminals over local network, real-time synchronization
- **Cloud dashboard**: Manage all locations from a single web panel with automatic backups
- **Architecture**: Rust backend (edge computing), React frontend via Tauri, SQLite local storage, PostgreSQL cloud

## Pricing

- **Starter**: €31/month (annual) or €39/month — 1 location, up to 3 devices
- **Professional**: €55/month (annual) or €69/month — up to 5 locations, unlimited devices
- **Enterprise**: Custom pricing — unlimited locations, private cloud deployment, dedicated SLA
- All plans include 14-day free trial, no credit card required

## Verifactu Compliance

RedCoral includes full Verifactu compliance out of the box:
- Digitally signed invoices (F2 sales invoices, R5 correction invoices)
- Immutable hash chain for all financial records
- Automatic submission to AEAT (Spain's tax authority)
- No additional modules or costs required
- Ready before the 2027 mandatory deadline

## Technology

- **Offline architecture**: Local SQLite database with event sourcing ensures zero downtime
- **Security**: mTLS (mutual TLS) encrypted communication, per-device certificates
- **Data integrity**: Cryptographic hash chain (SHA-256) linking all orders and credit notes
- **Cloud sync**: Automatic background synchronization when connectivity is available

## Contact

- Website: https://redcoral.app

- Legal entity: RedCoral Software S.L. (Spain)
